anatomy.description: Rounded card with drop shadow. Fixed 374×80px. Carries background fill, border-radius, and layout.
24×24px utility icon inside a 40×40px pill-shaped container. Icon and container color communicate semantic type.
Vertical stack of title and optional description. Flex-grows to fill available width.
Short summary of what happened. 18px Manrope SemiBold. Single line, truncates on overflow.
Supporting detail. 14px Manrope Medium. Up to 2 lines. Optional.
32×32px icon button (× icon). Dismisses the Toast manually. Recommended when toasts may stack.
Thin progress bar at the bottom edge of the card. Reflects the auto-dismiss timer.

variants.name: info
variants.description: Neutral informational update. No action required.

variants.name: error
variants.description: Lightweight recoverable error feedback. Not for blocking errors.

variants.name: success
variants.description: Completion confirmation after a completed action.

variants.name: trip
variants.description: Product-specific type for background trip-related events. Driver App context only.

sizes.name: default
sizes.note: Single fixed size across all types.

states.name: Visible
states.description: Toast is mounted and displayed. Auto-dismiss timer running.

states.name: Dismissed
states.description: Toast is unmounted or hidden. Triggered by auto-dismiss timeout or manual close.

behavior.stackingBehavior: Stack with controlled spacing. Avoid flooding.

placement.confirmedInProduct: Driver App — top of screen at 61px from top edge
placement.note: Must not cover primary actions or navigation controls when possible.

relatedComponents.name: Alert Dialog
relatedComponents.when: High-risk, irreversible, or blocking interruptions requiring a decision.

relatedComponents.name: Standard Dialog
relatedComponents.when: Forms, multi-input tasks, and reversible flows.

relatedComponents.name: Snackbar
relatedComponents.when: Lightweight recoverable issues with quick actions (Undo / Retry).

notes: Confirmed real-world usage: type=info — 'Passkey name changed' — Driver App, Account > Personal Information screen, node 2581:7098.
The 'trip' type is product-specific to the Dojo Driver context. Not a generic semantic type.
The Counter sub-component (5247:508) is always present. It represents the auto-dismiss timer.
Token values confirmed from get_design_context on node 5247:369 (type=info). Other type icon/color values are TODO.
